title: Tax Season Survival Guide for Solo Operators
excerpt: Stay calm, organised, and audit-ready with these year-round habits.
content:
## Don't wait for April

Reconciling 12 months in one weekend is how mistakes happen. Build a 30-minute monthly close instead.

### What to track

- Every invoice issued and paid
- Every business expense with receipt
- Mileage and home-office allocations

### Export early

Billinox exports clean PDF and CSV reports your accountant will actually thank you for.
author: Adaeze Okafor
